name: Roman Empire
declaringWar: You stand in the way of my people. Let us solve this like warriors!
attacked: You dare have the courage to challenge the mighty empire of Rome?
defeated: Rome shall rise anew from the ashes, and your blood shall water our lands.
introduction: Kneel at the mighty Emperor of Rome.
tradeRequest: I am not always this generous, but we hope you take this rare opportunity we give you.
uniques: No damage penalty for wounded units <for [non-air] units>

name: America
declaringWar: It is our God-given right to manifest destiny unto you!
attacked: Our homeland shall not be assaulted by you heathens.
defeated: I see democracy has not died in darkness.
introduction: Greetings, from these United States of America.
tradeRequest: I would be grateful if you agreed on the following proposal.
uniques: Upon capturing a city, receive [3] times its [Culture] production as [Faith] immediately
[+1 Faith, +1 Gold] from each Trade Route
